amdmi3      2009-06-10 02:06:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/liblastfm      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    audio/liblastfm/files patch-configure 
  Log:
  liblastfm is a collection of libraries to help you integrate Last.fm services
  into your rich desktop software. It depends on Qt 4.4.
  
  WWW: http://github.com/mxcl/liblastfm/tree/master
  
  PR:             135347
  Submitted by:   Matt Tosto <datahead4@gmail.com>
